description: Pre-Session B classification for anger (reg 4). Confirms existing anchor verse Eph 4:26. Extracts 4 genuine anger terms from None-status pool (H0599, H2194, H3708A, G3950). Confirms delete of G3949_related (duplicate). Issues bulk_delete note for 92 delete-flagged terms and the None-status bleed families. Requests new JSON export after patch application due to scale of None-status bleed requiring full verse verification.

operations.description: Confirm anchor verse for anger registry: Eph 4:26 — 'Be angry and do not sin; do not let the sun go down on your anger.' Already set in registry. This is the correct anchor: the only NT verse that explicitly permits anger while naming its moral condition — the two-forms structure (righteous anger / sinful anger) encoded in a single imperative. Confirming and retaining.
H0599 a.naph [be angry] — extracted. Genuine anger vocabulary from None-status pool.

set.status_note: Primary anger verb. 14 verses all confirmed anger of God: Deu 1:37, 4:21, 9:8, 9:20 — God angry with Moses and Israel. Always describes divine anger in this registry. Genuine anger vocabulary.

operations.description: H2194 za.am [be indignant] — extracted. Genuine anger vocabulary from None-status pool.

set.status_note: Verbal form of H2195 za.am indignation (already extracted). 11 verses. Psa 7:11 'God feels indignation every day.' Num 23:7-8 (Balaam cannot curse whom God has not cursed). Genuine anger vocabulary.

operations.description: H3708A ka.as [vexation (noun)] — extracted. Genuine anger vocabulary from None-status pool.

set.status_note: Noun form of H3707 ka.as (already extracted). 22 verses. Deu 32:19 provocation of sons and daughters; 1Sa 1:6 Hannah's rival used to provoke her to irritate her. The vexation/provocation noun. Genuine anger vocabulary.

operations.description: G3950 parorgismos [anger] — extracted. Genuine anger vocabulary from None-status pool.

set.status_note: Noun form of G3949 parorgizō (already extracted). 1 verse: Eph 4:26 — the anchor verse itself. 'Do not let the sun go down on your anger (parorgismos).' Genuine anger vocabulary.

operations.description: G3949_related parorgizō — confirm delete. Duplicate entry of G3949 parorgizō (already extracted). del_flag already set. mti_id=41.

set.exclusion_reason: Duplicate entry of G3949 parorgizō (mti_id=40, extracted). del_flag already set.

operations.description: BULK NOTE: 92 delete-flagged None-status terms. These were assigned delete_flagged=1 during prior Session B work (documented in FrameworkB-SessionB-Handover-20260324.docx). The handover confirms these are confirmed bleed: na.phal (fall), a.var (pass), pa.neh (face), pa.nah (turn), qum (arise), shem (name), lev (heart), ya.da (know), and 80+ related sub-glosses — all entering via H0639G aph (face:anger) extended relatedNos network. Bulk set mti status=delete on all 92 delete-flagged None-status terms in this registry.
operations.filter: registry_no=4 AND delete_flagged=1 AND mti_status IS NULL

set.exclusion_reason: Session A v4 relatedNos bleed confirmed by prior Session B review. See FrameworkB-SessionB-Handover-20260324.docx §3.4.

operations.description: BULK NOTE: Remaining None-status bleed (with verses) not already delete-flagged. Identified bleed families requiring delete: G3844 para (preposition, 867 occ), H5674A a.var to pass (513 occ), H6440H pa.neh face (417 occ), H5307G na.phal to fall (280 occ), H7307G/H ru.ach spirit/breath (216+145 occ — xref to spirit registry), H6437G pa.nah to turn (134 occ), H6440I/J/K/L/N pa.neh sub-glosses, H5307H/I/J na.phal sub-glosses, H5676G/H e.ver side, H5668 a.vur for-sake-of, H7381 re.ach aroma, H6442 pe.ni.mi inner, H5674C/D a.var sub-glosses, H7271 re.gal foot, H2553 cham.man pillar, H4569B ford, H4658 carcass, H5861 bird of prey, H7308 ru.ach (Aramaic - xref spirit), H4307H guardhouse, H2527 chom heat, H6441 within, H7306 ri.ach to smell, G3691 oxus sharp, H5308 ne.phal Aramaic fall. Claude Code: set mti_status=delete for all these strongs_numbers in registry 4.

set.exclusion_reason: Session A v4 relatedNos bleed from aph/face root family and secondary chains. No anger content.

xref_exceptions.H7307G: xref_spirit — ru.ach (spirit) primary in spirit registry (reg 184)
xref_exceptions.H7307H: xref_spirit — ru.ach (spirit: breath) primary in spirit registry
xref_exceptions.H7308: xref_spirit — ru.ach Aramaic form, primary in spirit registry

notes: Anger is a Session A v4 registry with extensive bleed — the largest pre-analysis cleaning task of the three words.
4 genuine terms extracted from None-status: H0599 a.naph, H2194 za.am, H3708A ka.as, G3950 parorgismos.
ru.ach sub-glosses (H7307G, H7307H, H7308) classified as xref_spirit not delete — they entered via H7307J ru.ach:temper (extracted) but their primary analysis is in the spirit registry.

IMPORTANT: After bulk deletes are applied, a fresh JSON export is requested. The anger registry needs verification of its clean active inventory before Session B analysis begins. The 177 None-status terms cannot be fully verified from the current export given the bleed depth.
The 92 delete-flagged terms confirmed as correctly flagged per prior Session B work (handover documentation).
